creator: sunpoet@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Nicholas Kirby from comment #3)

You could try updating textproc/py-sphinx to a newer version (e.g., the latest 8.0.2). After that, you have to test all dependent ports [1] and fix the broken ones. If everything works, you could submit another PR for the py-sphinx update.

[1] You could get the list by running "git grep :textproc/py-sphinx"
